commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: It is clear and obvious that evil people are always throwing curses and bitterness at the good in an attempt to harm and distract them. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: To those, no doubt, who have received the grace of the "adoption, by which we cry, Abba Father."
